docTitle: Bibiliya ku ikarata · Bibiliya mu kuyirenga ijisho rimwe
metaDesc: Kurikira urutonde rw’ibihe vy’Isezerano rya Kera, ubuzima bwa Yesu, n’ingendo za Paulo ku ikarata nyakuri — Bibiliya yabereye ahantu nyakuri.

s.kicker: Bibiliya mu kuyirenga ijisho rimwe · Amakarata
s.title: Bibiliya ku ikarata
s.verse: “Kuko tutākurikiye imigani yaremwe n’akenge, hamwe twabamenyesha ubushobozi bg’Umwami wacu Yesu Kristo no kuzoza kwiwe; ariko n’uko twiboneye n’amaso yacu icubahiro ciwe gihambaye.” (2 Petero 1:16)
s.purpose: Bibiliya si umugani. Ni inyandiko y’abantu bagendeye ahantu, ku matariki, n’amazina vy’ukuri. Kurikira izo nzira ku ikarata, mu rutonde rw’ibihe — fyonda ku kadomo, canke ufyonde ▶ kugira ngo ubirengeremwo intambwe ku yindi.
s.ot_kick: ① Isezerano rya Kera — mu rugendo rw’ibihe
s.ot_h: Kuva ku kurema gushitsa ku gutaha i Yeruzalemu
s.ot_lead: Si urugendo rumwe ariko ni umuyoboro w’amateka y’ugucungurwa uhereye ku kurema: ukurema n’ukugwa → umwuzure na Babeli → guhamagara (Aburahamu) → igihugu casezeranywe → Kuva muri Egiputa → ubugaragwa → kwigarurira igihugu → ubgami → kugabanuka → ubunyagano → ugutaha.
s.je_kick: ② Isezerano Risha — ubuzima bwa Yesu
s.je_h: Kuva i Betelehemu gushitsa i Yeruzalemu
s.je_lead: Kurikira ubuzima bwa Yesu nk’uko Injili zibuvuga, mu rutonde — uhereye ku kuvuka kwiwe i Betelehemu, ucishe ku kubatizwa kwiwe n’igikorwa co i Galilaya, wambuke Samariya, ushike ku musaraba, ku kuzuka no ku kuduga i Yeruzalemu.
s.pa_kick: ③ Isezerano Risha — ingendo za Paulo
s.pa_h: Kuva i Antiyokiya gushitsa ku mpera y’isi — i Roma
s.pa_lead: Uhereye kuri Pentekoti i Yeruzalemu, ukuntu inkuru nziza yakwiragiye irengeye Yudaya gusa — icishe muri Aziya Ntoya n’i Buraya ishika mu mutima w’ingoma. Tora rumwe mu ngendo zitanu (iya 1·iya 2·iya 3 + urugendo rwo i Roma + inyuma yo gufungurwa) maze ukurikire ibintu vyo mu Vyakozwe hamwe n’amakete yanditswe mu nzira.
s.foot: Inkomoko · Ahantu hakurikiza umwandiko wa Bibiliya na geografiya isanzwe ya Bibiliya (hamwe n’amazina ya none aho bifasha). Inkombe z’ikiyaga, imigezi n’ibiyaga vyacurijwe bishingiye ku makuru ya geografiya afunguye (Natural Earth), yoroheje.

eden.name: Edeni (Ukurema · Ukugwa)
eden.note: Mu isi yaremwe iri “nziza cane,” icaha kirinjira gica isano hagati y’Imana n’umuntu.
events: Isezerano rya mbere ry’inkuru nziza — “uruvyaro rw’umugore ruzomena umutwe w’inzoka”

noah.name: Ararati (Umwuzure)
noah.today: Umusozi Ararati, mu buseruko bwa Turukiya uyu musi
noah.note: Imana iraciye urubanza isi yuzuyemwo icaha, yamara igakiza ubuzima biciye ku muryango umwe.

babel.name: Umunara wa Babeli
babel.note: Imbere y’ubgibone bushaka kugera mw ijuru, Imana iravanga ururimi rwabo igatataniriza abantu mu isi.
events: Abantu baratatana mu isi (Shinari — yaje kuba Babuloni)

ur.name: Uri
ur.note: Inkuru y’ugukizwa ya Bibiliya itangurira ku guhamagara umuntu umwe.
events: Imana ihamagara Aburamu imukura i Uri rw’Abakaludaya
“Nzoguhindura ubgoko bukomeye… imiryango yose izoba umugisha kubgawe”
Ku bgo kwizera ava mu gihugu ciwe

haran.name: Harani
haran.note: Mu nzira, yishura ku ihamagara yerekeza ku gihugu casezeranywe.
events: Umuryango wa Tera utura i Harani
Aburamu yerekeza i Kanani afise imyaka 75

shechem.name: Shekemu · Kanani
shechem.note: Mu gihugu casezeranywe hashingwa umuryango maze isezerano rigaca imbere ku ruvyaro.
events: Kwinjira i Kanani, igicaniro ca mbere — “iki gihugu nzogiha uruvyaro rwawe”
Abahungu cumi na babiri ba Yakobo — umuzi w’imiryango cumi n’ibiri

egypt.name: Egiputa (Gosheni)
egypt.today: Delta ya Nili, Egiputa uyu musi
egypt.note: Umuryango uba ubgoko bukomeye — maze uca uba ubgoko bw’abaja.
events: Yozefu, yagujishijwe, aba umutware muri Egiputa
Umuryango wose wa Yakobo umanuka uhunga inzara
Ubgoko bwa Isirayeli bwiyongera bugirwa abaja

sinai.name: Umusozi Sinayi
sinai.note: Ugukiza guhambaye kuruta gwose mw Isezerano rya Kera — abaja baba ubgoko bw’Imana.
events: Amategeko Cumi, Ivyagezwe, ihema ryeranda n’ibimazi

kadesh.name: Kadeshi (ubugaragwa)
kadesh.note: Ukutizera gutuma iyaruka ritakaza igihugu — yamara Imana iguma iri kumwe nabo.
events: Abatasi cumi na babiri — ariko ubgoko bwanka kwizera
Imyaka 38 mu bugaragwa — imana, igicu n’umuriro
Ku kibaya ca Mowabu, ijambo rya nyuma rya Musa (Gusubira mu vyagezwe)

jericho.name: Yeriko
events: Uruzi rwa Yorodani rutandukana ubgoko buranyura

shiloh.name: Shilo (Abacamanza)
shiloh.note: Ata mwami, umuntu wese akora ico yigombeye — umwami nyakuri arakenewe.
events: Rusi — ubudahemuka mu misi y’umwiza, mu ruvyaro rwa Dawidi

jerusalem.name: Yeruzalemu · Ubgami bgunze ubumwe
jerusalem.note: Igihe c’iteka rya Isirayeli — n’isezerano ry’umwami adahera.
events: Sauli umwami wa mbere, hanyuma Dawidi na Goliyati
Isezerano rya Dawidi — “ingoma yawe izokwama ibihe vyose” (2 Samweli 7)

samaria.name: Samariya · Ubgami bugabanijwe
samaria.note: Ubgami buragabanuka kandi buca bibora mu gihe abavugishwa n’Imana bataka.
events: Inyuma ya Salomo, ubgami bugabanijwe mwo Yuda na Isirayeli
Eliya, Yesaya, Yeremiya bataka bati ‘nimugaruke’ — kandi bahanura Mesiya

nineveh.name: Nineve (Ashuri)
nineveh.note: Yirengagije imiburo yose, ubgami bw’uburaruko bugwa imbere.
events: Ubgami bw’uburaruko bugwa imbere ya Ashuri (722 I.K.)

babylon.name: Babuloni
babylon.note: Ijoro riniya kuruta yose — yamara isezerano ryo gusubizwa mu busanzwe rikomeza kubaho.
events: Yuda ijanwa mu bunyagano i Babuloni
Daniyeli na Ezekiyeli — ukwizera n’amayerekwa mu bunyagano

susa.name: Shushani (Buperesi)
susa.note: Mbere no mu mutima w’ingoma y’abapagani, Imana irinda ubgoko bwayo.
events: Nehemiya asengera imbere y’umwami maze arungikwa

return.name: Ugutaha i Yeruzalemu
return.note: Barataha bongera kwubaka — ariko nta mwami yaje. Barindira Mesiya.
events: Imihārure itatu yo gutaha ku citegekano ca Kuro (Zerubabeli 538 · Ezira 458 · Nehemiya 444)
Urusengero rwongera kwubakwa n’inkike za Yeruzalemu zisanwa
Malaki — Isezerano rya Kera rirasozwa: “ngira ntume integuza yanje”

bethlehem.name: Betelehemu
bethlehem.note: Mesiya yasezeranywe araza mu cibare ca Dawidi — Jambo yabaye umuntu.
events: Yavukiye i Betelehemu, mu cibare ca Dawidi

nazareth.name: Nazareti
nazareth.note: Imana ikurira nk’umuntu mu cibare gisanzwe.
events: Afise imyaka cumi n’ibiri, abaza akanishura mu rusengero
Inyuma yangwa mu sinagogi yo mu cibare ciwe

jordan.name: Uruzi rwa Yorodani
jordan.note: Igikorwa ciwe rusangi kiratangura — ijuru rimuhamya nk’Umwana.
events: Mpwemu amanuka nk’inuma — “Uyu ni Umwana wanje nkunda”
Atsinda ibigeragezo bitatu vya Shetani mu bugaragwa

cana.name: Kana
cana.note: Mu gitangaro ciwe ca mbere ahishura ubuninahazwa bwiwe.
events: Amazi ahindurwa umuvinyu — igitangaro ciwe ca mbere

sychar.name: Sukari (Samariya)
sychar.note: Inzira y’igikorwa ca mbere — inyura i Yeruzalemu ishika no muri Samariya yagawe.
events: Mw ijoro, Nikodemu — “utegerezwa kuvuka ubga kabiri”

capernaum.name: Kaperinawumu
capernaum.today: ku nkombe y’ikiyaga ca Galilaya uyu musi
capernaum.note: Ihuriro ry’igikorwa co i Galilaya — guhamagara, kwigisha no kurwanywa vyose bihurira ng’aha.
events: Inyigisho yo ku musozi — “hahiriwe abakene mu mutima”

galilee.name: Ikiyaga ca Galilaya
galilee.note: Afise ububasha ku biremwa yerekana uwo ari we.
events: Agaburira abantu 5.000 ku migati itanu n’amafi abiri

caesarea_p.name: Kayisariya Filipi
caesarea_p.note: Abigishwa baratahura ko ari Kristo, maze inzira y’umusaraba ikingurwa.
events: Ukwemera kwa Petero — “Uri Kristo, Umwana w’Imana nzima”

jericho.name: Yeriko
jericho.note: Mu nzira aduga aja i Yeruzalemu, ararondera abazimiye.
events: “Umwana w’umuntu yaje kurondera no gukiza abazimiye”

bethany.name: Betaniya
bethany.note: Yerekana ububasha ku rupfu mu mugoroba w’iyinga ryiwe rya nyuma.
events: Azura Lazaro mu mva — “Ni jewe kuzuka n’ubuzima”
Iki gitangaro congera umugambi wo kumwica

jerusalem.name: Yeruzalemu
jerusalem.note: Indunduro Bibiliya yose yariko yerekeza — umusaraba, ukuzuka, ukuduga.
events: Kwinjira mu buninahazwa; ahirika imeza z’urusengero kandi
Ku Mfungurwa ya Nyuma akarabira abigishwa ibirenge
Azuka ku musi ugira gatatu, hanyuma araduga

antioch.name: Antiyokiya
antioch.note: Ikanisa rirungika aho ubutumwa ku banyamahanga butangurira kandi bugarukira.
events: Mu gusenga Mpwemu atora Barinaba na Sauli
Aho ingendo ya 1, iya 2 n’iya 3 zitangurira

seleucia.name: Selukiya
seleucia.note: Icambu ca Antiyokiya — berekeza i Kupuro mu kiyaga.

salamis.name: Salami (Kupuro)
salamis.note: Ihagararo rya mbere i Kupuro — kwigisha mu masinagogi.

paphos.name: Pafo
paphos.note: Ububasha bwerekanwa ku barwanya inkuru nziza.

perga.name: Peruge
perga.note: Icambu ca Pamfiliya — ng’aha Yohana Mariko agaruka inyuma.

pantioch.name: Antiyokiya ya Pisidiya
events: Ijambo rirerire ry’amateka y’ugukizwa mu sinagogi

iconium.name: Ikoniyumu
iconium.note: Benshi baremera, ariko ihigwa ribasunika imbere.

lystra.name: Lusitira
events: Akiza umuntu yari ikimuga kuva avuka
Atewe amabuye atabwa hanze nk’uwapfuye, arahaguruka

derbe.name: Derube
derbe.note: Abigishwa benshi barakorwa; basubira mu nzira gukomeza amakanisa.

troas.name: Tirowa
troas.note: Ahantu h’impinduka aho inkuru nziza ibanza kwerekeza i Buraya.

philippi.name: Filipi
philippi.note: Ikanisa rya mbere ry’i Buraya — inkuru nziza iratsinda mbere no mw ibohero.
events: Indirimbo z’ijoro, ugusununuka kw’isi, umuryango w’umurinzi w’ibohero urakizwa

thess.name: Tesalonike
events: Aganira mu sinagogi mu masabato atatu

corinth.name: Korinto
corinth.note: Amara umwaka n’igice ashinga ikanisa mu gisagara c’ubuhumbu.
events: Akorana amahema na Akwila na Pirisila

ephesus.name: Efeso
ephesus.note: Umutima w’urugendo rwa gatatu — ijambo rikwira muri Aziya.
events: Kwigisha imisi yose mu myaka ibiri mw ishuri rya Tirano

miletus.name: Mileto
miletus.note: Gusezera kw’amosozi ku bagabo b’i Efeso.
events: “Mwiyubare kandi murinde ikanisa yaguze amaraso yiwe”
Abagabo bararira, bazi ko batazosubira kumubona

caesarea.name: Kayisariya
caesarea.today: ku nkombe ya Isirayeli uyu musi
caesarea.note: Mu myaka ibiri arwanira inkuru nziza imbere y’aba guverineri n’umwami.
events: Imanza imbere ya guverineri Felike na Fesito

jerusalem.name: Yeruzalemu
jerusalem.note: Afatirwa mu rusengero, inzira yiwe nk’imbohe iratangura.
events: Nk’umwenegihugu w’Umuroma, arungikwa arinzwe i Kayisariya

myra.name: Mira
myra.note: Bimukira mu bwato bw’i Alegizandiriya bwerekeza i Roma.

fairhaven.name: Ivyambu Vyiza (Kireta)
fairhaven.note: Imburizi ya Paulo yo guhagarika urugendo ntiyumvirwa.

crete.name: Kireta
crete.note: Inyuma yo gufungurwa, izinga aho asiga Tito gutunganya amakanisa.
events: Asiga Tito gushiraho abagabo muri buri gisagara

malta.name: Malita
malta.note: Biciye mu muyaga no kumeneka kw’ubwato, isezerano ry’Imana rirakomera.
events: Umuyaga ukomeye umeneza ubwato, yamara bose 276 barakira
Arumwa n’inzoka, ariko ntiyagira aho yononekara

puteoli.name: Puteyoli
puteoli.note: Bashika mu Butaliyano maze abizera bagenzi babo babasanganira.

rome.name: Roma
rome.book: Ivyakozwe 28 · Amakete yo mw ibohero · 2 Timoteyo
rome.note: Inkuru nziza ishika mu mutima w’ingoma amaherezo — si iherezo ariko ni intango.
events: Imyaka ibiri afungiwe mu rugo, atangaza ubgami ata bgoba
Uhereye ng’aha yandika Amakete yo mw ibohero (Abanyefeso·Abafilipi·Abakolosayi·Filemoni)
Inyuma yongera gufungwa, yandika 2 Timoteyo agahonywa — “narwanye intambara nziza, narangije iruhando”

journeys.rome: Urugendo rwa kane · rwo i Roma
journeys.j5: Urugendo rwa gatanu · inyuma yo gufungurwa
